# Copilot Instructions — BizantiAgent

## Inheritance
- Canonical ecosystem rules live in [Bizanti/.github/copilot-instructions.md](../../Bizanti/.github/copilot-instructions.md).
- This file defines only BizantiAgent-local deltas.

## Local context
- Project: `BizantiAgent`
- Key files: `cmd/*`, `internal/*`, `scripts/*`, `go.mod`

## Repo-specific rules
- Keep agent-specific implementation details in this repository.
- For Bizanti ecosystem validation requirements, do not create or run mandatory Laravel tests here; create/run them only in the main `Bizanti/` app repository.
